makc        2009-03-09 21:20:41 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    deskutils            Makefile 
  Added files:
    deskutils/plasma-applet-yawp Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                 pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Add new port deskutils/plasma-applet-yawp:
  
  yaWP (Yet Another Weather Plasmoid) is a plasma applet for KDE4 that displays
  weather information on your desktop.
  
  WWW: http://www.kde-look.org/content/show.php?content=94106
  
  PR:             ports/130596
  Submitted by:   Jason E. Hale <bsdkaffee at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.359     +1 -0      ports/deskutils/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/deskutils/plasma-applet-yawp/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/deskutils/plasma-applet-yawp/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/deskutils/plasma-applet-yawp/pkg-descr (new)
